question: Is the top main title exactly: "NIGHT FLIGHT NAVIGATION SYSTEM: SAFE MODE ACTIVATED — PLEASE REMAIN CALM AND FOLLOW EACH INSTRUCTION STEP BY STEP"?
Is the top main title rendered in a thin sans-serif font?

Is the top-left warning panel text exactly: "IMPORTANT NOTICE: Three consecutive incorrect inputs will trigger a ten-minute lockout and erase all temporary records and cached data; please type slowly and carefully, do not rush"?
Is the top-left warning panel text rendered in a bold sans-serif font?

Is the top-right checklist text exactly: "PREFLIGHT CHECKLIST: Power supply connected; Signal strength stable; All doors and windows secured; Seatbelt properly fastened; Luggage safely stowed; Headphone volume reduced"?
Is the top-right checklist text rendered in a dot-matrix style font?
Is the center verification panel text exactly: "VERIFICATION CODE A1B2-C3D4-E5F6-G7H8 (Please verify each character one by one, do not skip or misread; proceed only after full confirmation)"?
Is the center verification panel text rendered in a monospace font?
Are the lower panel equations exactly: "QUICK CALC: 12/5=2.4; 2.4×5=12; (7+9)×3=48; (10-3)×2=14; 14+6=20" (including correct multiplication symbols '×')?
Are the lower panel equations contained within a single line?
Are the lower panel equations rendered in a monospace font?
Is the bottom-left quote exactly: "Not every answer must come at once, but every step must be taken with clarity and steadiness; focus first on doing the very next step well"?
Is the bottom-left quote rendered in a rounded sans-serif font?

Is the bottom strip message exactly: "If you should see the bright moon rising o'er the sea, remember to send these words to those far away: we share this selfsame light across the distance, all of us striving to live our days with greater clarity and meaning"?
Is the bottom strip message rendered in a thin serif font?
Does the image contain ONLY the specified text blocks (no corner labels, button text, coordinate scales, or fake brand names)?
Is all text horizontal, forward-facing, and not mirrored?
Is the background a black-to-blue gradient with fine grid lines?
Are the text characters free from structural defects (e.g., missing strokes, merged letters, or unrecognizable symbols)?
